eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Idaho; Malheur, OR; Lincoln, MT; Spokane, WA; at 3:24 PM on MAR 20, 2019 Effective until 5:24 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is an activation of the amber alert system.  This is the Idaho State Communications Center. We have just received this important information regarding a child abducted in Canyon County. The Nampa Police Department  is looking for a child who was last seen in Hermiston, Oregon and is believed to be in danger. The childs name is Alissa Helmandollar. She is a 10 year old caucasian female with brown hair. 
Authorities say that the child may be in the company of Brooke Helmandollar Blessing and they may be traveling in a 2018 Silver Nissan Sentra that was last seen possibly heading towards Porland, Oregon or Kootenai, County Idaho. If you have any information on the where abouts of this child, please contact Nampa Police Department 208-465-2206. immediately.
